synopsis: Star Wars: Lethal Alliance is a third-person action-adventure video game that was released for the PlayStation Portable and Nintendo DS consoles on December 5 and December 12, 2006, respectively. The game follows the adventures of Twi'lek mercenary Rianna Saren and her security droid, Zeeo, who attempt to steal the Death Star blueprints and fight the Imperial slaver Kheev.
title: Star Wars: Lethal Alliance
